code:
value MinMax
  min: Int
  max: Int
end

fn min_max(_ xs: List<Int>) -> MinMax
  mut min_val = xs[0]
  mut max_val = xs[0]
  mut i = 1
  while i < xs.len()
    let x = xs[i]
    if x < min_val
      min_val = x
    end
    if x > max_val
      max_val = x
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  MinMax(min: min_val, max: max_val)
end

let result = min_max([5, 1, 9, 3, 7, 2])
print("min=#{result.min}")
print("max=#{result.max}")
